sections.heading: KEY REGULATORY INSTRUMENTS FOR THE ACTUALIZATION OF CLOUD
sections.summary: Section : 23.0 defines key regulatory instruments for cloud actualization.

requirements.text: KEY REGULATORY INSTRUMENTS FOR THE ACTUALIZATION OF CLOUD

sections.source_quote: KEY REGULATORY INSTRUMENTS FOR THE ACTUALIZATION OF CLOUD 23.0

sections.summary: This policy promotes cloud computing adoption for Nigerian public institutions and SMEs through a 'cloud-first' approach, aiming to reduce costs, improve service delivery, and foster local cloud service provider growth.
sections.dtia_summary: Requires public institutions and SMEs to prioritize cloud services for procurement, with specific data classification and security requirements for cloud migration.

requirements.text: Public Institutions shall prioritize procurement of cloud-based ICT solutions
Data classification framework must be implemented for cloud migration
Cloud service providers must comply with security certifications

sections.source_quote: Public Institutions shall prioritize procurement of cloud-based information and communication technologies (ICTs), whenever possible.
